statement: In every magma, Equation 3632 (`x * y = z * ((z * w) * u)`) implies Equation 4475 (`x * (y * y) = (x * z) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0206
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op z w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op (op x z) x)
